description: Progress report from a running job. Common fields are stage/percentage/message; job-type-specific fields may also be present. This is the single progress shape for every job type — annotation workers and generation alike.

annotationId.description: Annotation this job is attached to, when applicable. Echoed inside JobProgress (in addition to the outer command envelope) so consumers that only see the inner progress object (e.g. client.yield.fromAnnotation's Observable) can still route visual feedback to a specific annotation.

completedEntityTypes.description: Reference annotation: completed entity types with per-type counts, for UI progress display

requestParams.description: Echoed job parameters for display in the progress UI (e.g. entity types or categories the user asked to detect)
